Package DSA.Sorting

Class GTUQuickSort

  • java.lang.Object
    • DSA.Sorting.GTUSorter
      • DSA.Sorting.GTUQuickSort
  • public class GTUQuickSort
extends GTUSorter
    GTUQuickSort class implements quicksort algorithm with random pivot selection. Extends GTUSorter abstract class to provide generic sorting functionality. Supports optimization using another sorter for small partitions. Time Complexity: O(n log n) average case, O(n²) worst case Space Complexity: O(log n) due to recursion

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor Description
      GTUQuickSort()
      Default constructor for GTUQuickSort.
      GTUQuickSort​(GTUSorter fallbackSorter, int partitionLimit)
      Constructor for GTUQuickSort with fallback sorter and partition limit.

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      protected <T> void sort​(T[] arr, int start, int end, java.util.Comparator<T> comparator)
      Sorts elements in array between start (inclusive) and end (exclusive) using quicksort.

      • Methods inherited from class DSA.Sorting.GTUSorter

        sort

    • Constructor Detail

      • GTUQuickSort

        public GTUQuickSort()
        Default constructor for GTUQuickSort. Uses quicksort for all partition sizes without fallback sorter. Time Complexity: O(1) Space Complexity: O(1)

      • GTUQuickSort

        public GTUQuickSort​(GTUSorter fallbackSorter,
                    int partitionLimit)
        Constructor for GTUQuickSort with fallback sorter and partition limit. When partition size becomes smaller than limit, uses fallbackSorter instead. Time Complexity: O(1) Space Complexity: O(1)
        Parameters:
        fallbackSorter - Sorter to use for small partitions
        partitionLimit - Minimum partition size to use quicksort

    • Method Detail

      • sort

        protected <T> void sort​(T[] arr,
                        int start,
                        int end,
                        java.util.Comparator<T> comparator)
        Sorts elements in array between start (inclusive) and end (exclusive) using quicksort. Uses random pivot selection and optional fallback sorter for small partitions. Time Complexity: O(n log n) average, O(n²) worst case where n = end - start Space Complexity: O(log n) due to recursion
        Specified by:
        sort in class GTUSorter
        Type Parameters:
        T - Generic type parameter
        Parameters:
        arr - Array to be sorted
        start - Starting index (inclusive)
        end - Ending index (exclusive)
        comparator - Comparator to determine sort order
